---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for micro-jainslee
title: '[enhancement] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Is your use case blocked by the current
behaviour? Link any related GitHub issues.

## Detailed design

How would you implement it? Specifically:

- Which module(s) does it touch? (`jainslee-core`, `adapter-quarkus`,
  `jainslee-apt`, etc.)
- Does it require new public API surface?
- Does it require a Java version bump?
- Does it affect the JAIN SLEE 1.1 spec compliance?
- Does it interact with the dual-license constraints (does the new code
  need to be GPLv3 only, or could it live under the Commercial path)?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is your proposal
better?

## Testing strategy

How would you verify the change works? New unit test? Stress test at a
larger scale? Manual reproducer?

## Compatibility

Does this change break the existing public API? Does it require
existing users to update their dependencies?
